gaps.description: No ARCHITECTURE.md exists — design intent only in .ai/vision.md with no structural spec for modules, interfaces, or data flow
ask() design spec shows systemPrompt as 3rd positional param; implementation places it inside AgenticConfig — functionally equivalent but deviates from interface spec
AgenticResult.images typed as string[] | undefined; design (DBB-004) requires always string[] — runtime returns allImages correctly but TypeScript type still allows undefined
ShellResult type defined in types.ts but not exported from src/index.ts public API surface
tools/index.ts does not export shellToolDef/executeShell, inconsistent with other tool exports pattern
custom provider fallback: when provider='custom' and customProvider absent but baseUrl set, silently falls back to createOpenAIProvider — undocumented behavior
All core modules implemented: agent loop (ask.ts), provider abstraction (anthropic/openai/custom), tool system (search/code/file/shell), types, multi-round loop, rawContent replay
